Name: Pict View
Tagline: View base class with full lifecycle (initialize, render, solve, marshal), renderables, and CSS injection
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-pict-view-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#2781a9"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-pict-view-filled-light)"><circle cx="48" cy="48" r="37" fill="none" stroke="#e28754" stroke-width="3"/>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="26" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" stroke-width="3.5"/>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="15" fill="#e28754"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PV</text>
	</svg>
